title: Effectiveness
doc_html:
§185.6.  Effectiveness

The agricultural education immersion pilot program established pursuant to this Subpart shall be implemented as expeditiously as possible through any source of funding made available for this purpose.

Acts 2014, No. 450, §1, eff. June 4, 2014.
